{1} 个引用来源，已完成桶级映射。: {1} citation sources with bucket-level mapping complete.
{1}，负责接收任务、调用知识库、执行 SOP 并沉淀对话质量反馈。: {1} handles incoming tasks, queries the knowledge base, executes SOPs, and retains conversation-quality feedback.
」，用于验证员工实际可用的工具返回。: ", used to verify the tool response that is actually available to the employee.
# 技能说明 在这里编写技能文档。名称、Slug 和描述由上方表单维护，系统不会: # Skill Description Write the skill documentation here. Name, Slug, and description are managed in the form above and are not extracted from this document.
按目录结构组织知识范围，先看主题，再进入知识图谱。: Organize the knowledge scope by directory: review topics first, then open the knowledge graph.
按相关性选择知识库文档: Select Knowledge Base Documents by Relevance
把浏览器、查询、文档处理、MCP 或项目工作流沉淀为技能，让能力能被多个员工复用: Package browser, query, document-processing, MCP, and project workflows as skills that multiple employees can reuse and improve.
把业务文档沉淀为知识库，把关键流程拆成节点、必填信息、允许动作和回复规则。: Simpan dokumen bisnis sebagai basis pengetahuan, pecah alur kunci menjadi node, informasi wajib, tindakan yang diizinkan, dan aturan balasan.
把用户偏好、项目背景、复盘结论和协作习惯沉淀为可查记录，帮助后续会话继承已验证的: Retain user preferences, project context, review conclusions, and collaboration habits as searchable records so future conversations can inherit verified context.
把制度、交付文档和服务规范沉淀为知识库，再用引用和反馈持续修正口径。: Simpan aturan, dokumen pengiriman, dan standar layanan sebagai basis pengetahuan, lalu perbarui terus menerus dengan kutipan dan umpan balik.
把制度、商品、交付和服务口径解析为可检索片段，回复时保留引用线索，降低“听起来对: Parse policies, product, delivery, and service standards into searchable chunks, preserving citation trails in replies so answers remain verifiable.
保存后不可修改名称。: Setelah disimpan, nama tidak dapat diubah.
保存后到点会拉起一个新的执行记录，并交给当前员工按 SOP、技能、资料和工具执行: Sesuai jadwal, catatan eksekusi baru akan dibuat dan diberikan kepada karyawan saat ini untuk dieksekusi sesuai SOP, keterampilan, data, dan alat.
保存后可选择并测试: Setelah disimpan, dapat Dipilih dan Diuji
保留切片内容、原文片段和来源路径，用于回答溯源。: Keep chunk content, source excerpts, and source paths for answer traceability.
本次响应连接中断，未能确认服务端会话。请重试发送。: The connection was interrupted and the server session could not be confirmed. Please send again.
本次响应同步超时，请重试发送。: Response synchronization timed out. Please send again.
必要时转人工: Hand Off to a Human When Needed
编辑内部索引与引用来源: Edit Indeks Internal dan Sumber Kutipan
不是通用 Agent 框架，而是面向业务流程的企业对话运行时: An enterprise conversation runtime for business workflows, not a generic agent framework.
不要只用标准话术测试，要用用户真实表达覆盖缺信息、信息已给全、改口、插话和转人工: Test with real user language, including missing information, complete information, corrections, interruptions, and human handoff, not just standard scripts.
部分对话日志数据加载失败: Failed to load some conversation logs data
测试参数 JSON（拼到 URL Query）: Parameter Uji JSON (ditambahkan ke Query URL)
测试参数 JSON（作为请求 Body）: Parameter Uji JSON (dikirim sebagai Body permintaan)
测试参数不是合法 JSON: Parameter uji bukan JSON yang valid
创建你的第一位数字员工，为它配置知识库、技能与工具，即可开始接管对话与任务。: Create your first digital employee and configure its knowledge, skills, and tools to start handling conversations and tasks.
从当前员工移除后，工具广场中的原始工具不会被删除。: Removing this tool from the current employee does not delete the original tool from the Tool Marketplace.
从广场复制到当前数字员工的 SOP。: Copy an SOP from the Marketplace to the current digital employee.
从广场复制到当前数字员工的技能。: Copy a skill from the Marketplace to the current digital employee.
从广场复制到当前数字员工的知识库。: Copy a knowledge base from the Marketplace to the current digital employee.
从开放广场复制可用 SOP；不可复制内容不会出现在列表。: Copy an available SOP from the Marketplace. Items that cannot be copied are hidden.
从开放广场复制可用工具；复制后会成为当前员工的本地工具绑定。: Copy an available tool from the Marketplace and bind it locally to the current employee.
从开放广场复制可用技能；不会覆盖当前编辑区内容。: Copy an available skill from the Marketplace without overwriting the current editor content.
从开放广场复制可用技能；不可复制内容不会出现在列表。: Copy an available skill from the Marketplace. Items that cannot be copied are hidden.
从开放广场复制可用知识库；不可复制内容不会出现在列表。: Copy an available knowledge base from the Marketplace. Items that cannot be copied are hidden.
从开源平台导入失败: Failed to Import from Open-Source Platform
从空白开始创建，不继承任何已有配置。: Start from scratch without inheriting any existing configuration.
从空系统到一个可复盘员工: From an Empty System to a Reviewable Employee
从数字员工复制 SOP: Copy SOP from a digital employee
从数字员工复制工具: Copy tools from a digital employee
从数字员工复制技能: Copy skills from a digital employee
从数字员工复制可用 SOP；不可见内容不会出现在列表。: Copy an available SOP from another employee. Invisible items are hidden.
从数字员工复制可用工具；不可见内容不会出现在列表。: Copy an available tool from another employee. Invisible items are hidden.
从数字员工复制可用技能；不会覆盖当前编辑区内容。: Copy an available skill from another digital employee without overwriting the current editor content.
从数字员工复制可用技能；不可见内容不会出现在列表。: Copy an available skill from another employee. Invisible items are hidden.
从数字员工复制可用知识库；不可见内容不会出现在列表。: Copy an available knowledge base from another employee. Invisible items are hidden.
从数字员工复制知识库: Copy knowledge base from a digital employee
从用户消息到最终回复，中间的每一步都应该能在日志和 Trace 中找到证据。: Every step from user message to final reply should have evidence in logs and Trace.
大多数问题可以落到模型、知识、SOP、工具、权限和 Trace 六个层面定位。: Most issues can be diagnosed across six layers: model, knowledge, SOP, tools, permissions, and Trace.
代表引用来源，可在详情中查看来源映射。: Representative citation source. Open Details to view the source mapping.
当前 SOP 将切换为「{1}」的 {2} 版本内容，历史对话和反馈数据不会被删: The current SOP will switch to the {2} version of “{1}”. Conversation history and feedback data will not be deleted.
当前仓库由后端服务、企业端控制台和对话端组成。企业端负责配置，对话端负责使用，后: This repository contains the backend service, enterprise console, and chat experience. The console configures, chat consumes, and the backend runs conversations, knowledge, tools, and tasks.
当前工具配置中暂无描述: No description for the current tool configuration
当前还没有可管理的数字员工，创建一位或从开放广场复制已发布的配置作为起点。: There are no manageable digital employees yet. Create one or copy a published Marketplace configuration.
当前技能没有未保存变更，确认清空当前改写内容和对话记录？: There are no unsaved skill changes. Clear the current rewrite and conversation history?
当前节点是终止节点，默认流程结束。: This is a terminal node; the flow ends here by default.
当前浏览器不支持流式响应: Browser ini tidak mendukung respons streaming
当前浏览器无法处理头像图片: Browser ini tidak dapat memproses gambar avatar
当前没有内容变化，无需保存草稿。: There are no changes to save as a draft.
当前员工下你的长期记忆: Your Long-term Memory for the Current Employee
当前员工暂无本地 SOP: Belum ada SOP lokal untuk karyawan saat ini
当前员工暂无工具: Belum ada alat untuk karyawan saat ini
当前员工暂无技能: Belum ada keterampilan untuk karyawan saat ini
当前员工暂无用户记忆；新的对话记忆会按员工和用户隔离沉淀。: This employee has no user memory yet. New conversation memories are retained separately by employee and user.
当前员工暂无知识库: Belum ada basis pengetahuan untuk karyawan saat ini
当前租户下你的长期记忆: Your Long-term Memory for the Current Tenant
导出知识库备份包失败: Gagal mengekspor paket cadangan basis pengetahuan
导入后会生成知识图谱、知识索引和引用来源。: Importing generates a knowledge graph, knowledge indexes, and citation sources.
导入新技能前是否保存当前技能？: Save the current skill before importing a new one?
导入知识库备份包失败: Gagal mengimpor paket cadangan basis pengetahuan
点击「发现工具」后，这里会列出该 MCP Server 提供的工具。: Click “Discover Tools” to list tools provided by this MCP Server.
点击「发现工具」拉取 tools/list，勾选后「导入/同步」即可生成工具行。: Click “Discover Tools” to fetch tools/list, select tools, then choose “Import / Sync” to create tool entries.
点击调用后，这里会显示工具返回、错误信息和原始 data。: After calling the tool, its response, errors, and raw data appear here.
点击左下角「新建数字员工」开始创建，或前往员工广场选择已发布的员工。: Click “New Digital Employee” in the lower-left corner, or choose a published employee from the Employee Marketplace.
调整筛选条件，或换个关键词再试试: Adjust the filters or try another keyword.
定时任务 -> 运行记录 -> 记忆沉淀 -> 下轮复用: Scheduled Task -> Run Record -> Memory Retention -> Reuse in the Next Run
定时任务把周期工作常驻化: Scheduled tasks make recurring work persistent
对话端承接真实用户表达；企业端负责配置、运营和复盘。: Chat handles real user requests; the enterprise console handles configuration, operations, and review.
对话日志记录每轮输入输出: Conversation logs record the input and output of every turn.
发布到广场的知识库，可复制到你的数字员工。: Knowledge bases published to the Marketplace can be copied to your digital employees.
反馈分析定位失败原因: Use Feedback Analysis to Identify Failure Causes
反思轮数与单轮最大动作数必须是数字: Reflection rounds and maximum actions per turn must be numbers.
非 GET 请求会把这里的 JSON 作为请求体发送；仅 URL 查询串不会变成: For non-GET requests, this JSON is sent as the request body. URL query strings alone do not become a request body.
负责报销核对、预算口径、财务资料检索和风险提示。: Responsible for Expense Verification, budget standards, finance knowledge retrieval and risk alerts.
负责会议纪要、资料归档、跨部门事务跟进和结果同步。: Responsible for Meeting Notes, Knowledge Archive, cross-team follow-up and result synchronization.
负责研发资料查询、代码任务拆解、SOP 执行和交付记录沉淀。: Handles R&D knowledge lookup, code task breakdown, SOP execution, and delivery records.
负责知识库检索、资料结构化归档、信息核对和答案沉淀。: Handles knowledge retrieval, structured archiving, information verification, and answer retention.
该工具不是可新增候选: This tool is not an eligible candidate to add.
该任务没有绑定数字员工，请新建任务后再发送: This task has no digital employee assigned. Create a new task before sending.
改写失败，当前草稿未变更。: Rewrite failed. The current draft is unchanged.
改写失败，已保留当前草稿: Rewrite failed. The current draft was retained.
概括这个数字员工的岗位边界、服务风格和执行重点: Summarize this employee’s role boundaries, service style, and execution priorities.
岗位边界清楚，知道它能处理什么、不能处理什么。: Clear role boundaries, knows what it can handle, what it cannot handle.
工具：参数 schema 可验证，测试调用有结果。: Tool: parameter schema verifiable, Test Call has Result.
工具调用可验证，参数和结果都能复盘。: Tool calls are verifiable, and their parameters and results can be reviewed.
工具没有被调用怎么办？: What if a tool is not called?
功能开发时保持一个原则：配置变更要能被运行验证，运行失败要能被 Trace 解释: Keep one principle during development: configuration changes must be runtime-verifiable, and failures must be explainable through Trace.
共 {1} 个引用来源，当前暂无可展示的桶级代表来源。: {1} citation sources in total. No representative bucket-level source is available to display.
构建前端，并挂载对话端、企业端和 API。: Build the frontend and mount Chat, the enterprise console, and the API.
广场暂无可用数字员工: No digital employees are available in the Marketplace.
还没有后续节点，请新增流转规则。: There is no next node. Add a transition rule.
还有必填信息没有收集到时进入: Enter when required information is still missing.
核心功能不是散点，而是一套员工运行系统: Core capabilities form one employee operating system, not isolated features.
换个关键词，或切换员工分类再试试: Try another keyword or switch the employee category.
汇集所有可共享的 SOP、知识库、技能和工具，新建数字员工时可以从这里复制配置作: Collect all shared SOPs, knowledge bases, skills, and tools so new digital employees can copy them as a starting point.
几步搭好你的数字员工: Buat karyawan digital Anda dalam beberapa langkah
记忆沉淀长期偏好和复盘结论: Memory Retains Long-term Preferences and Review Conclusions
技能说明、权限或运行配置有更新: Deskripsi, izin, atau konfigurasi runtime keterampilan telah diperbarui
技能运行超时，请检查模型或稍后重试。: Waktu eksekusi keterampilan habis. Periksa model atau coba lagi nanti.
技能自发现工具: Alat yang Ditemukan Sendiri oleh Keterampilan
检测到当前 SOP 有未保存变更。你可以先保存当前内容；清空后会进入新的 SOP: This SOP has unsaved changes. Save it first if needed. Clearing opens a new SOP draft workspace and does not replace the original SOP with an empty one.
检查 API Key、Base URL 是否包含 `/v1`、模型 ID、余额和: Check the API Key, whether Base URL includes `/v1`, the model ID, balance, and network. Make the default model test pass before validating chat.
检查 SOP 节点 allowed_actions、工具启用状态、参数 sche: Check SOP node allowed_actions, tool enabled status, parameter schema, and current employee bindings.
检查节点 instruction、expected_user_info 和槽位抽: Check node instruction, expected_user_info, and slot extraction so already satisfied information is skipped.
检查文档解析状态、知识库是否绑定到当前员工，以及问题是否覆盖文档中的关键概念。: Check document parsing, whether the knowledge base is bound to the current employee, and whether the question covers key document concepts.
简单说明这个工具集的用途: Briefly describe this tool set’s purpose
将清空{1}，不会影响其他用户。确定继续？: This will clear {1}, without affecting other users. Continue?
接口连接失败，请检查本地服务或稍后重试: Endpoint Connection Failed. Check the Local Service or Try Again Later.
仅支持 .md、.doc、.docx、.txt 文件: Only supports. md, . doc, . docx, . txt File
开放广场会永久删除该知识库及其文档、内部索引、引用来源和版本记录。: The Marketplace will permanently delete this knowledge base, including documents, internal indexes, citations, and version history.
开启后，其他账号可以在对话端和数字员工广场中选择这个员工。: When enabled, other accounts can select this employee in Chat and the Digital Employee Marketplace.
可补充任务目的、范围或结果要求: Optionally add the task purpose, scope, or result requirements.
可读知识页，用于长期沉淀、跨文档综合和数字员工复制。: Readable Knowledge Page, for long-term retention, cross-document synthesis and Digital Employee Copy.
可复制到当前数字员工的技能。: Skills that can be copied to the current digital employee.
可复制和复用的业务流程与执行规范。: Reusable Business Workflows and Execution Standards.
可开放给员工调用和测试的工具能力。: Available to employees Call and Test Tool Capabilities.
可配置到员工工具的工具。: Tools that can be configured for an employee.
可选，参考文档或项目主页: Optional, reference document or project home page
可选，用于说明这个定时任务的来源和目的: Optional. Describe the source and purpose of this scheduled task.
控制一次用户输入内员工可连续决策和调用工具的最大次数，用于避免无限循环。: Limit how many consecutive decisions and tool calls an employee can make for one user input to prevent infinite loops.
例如 天气查询、代码审查: For example Weather Query, Code Review
例如 研发工程师、财务助理: For example: R&D Engineer or Finance Assistant
例如 alchaincyf/nuwa-skill 或 https://githu: For example alchaincyf/nuwa-skill or https: //github. com/owner/repo/tree/main/skill
例如：每日交付质量复盘: For example: Daily Delivery Quality Review
例如：请补充需要校验的报文内容。: For example: provide the payload that needs validation.
例如：信息完整后继续: For example: continue after all information is complete.
连接 MCP Server，自动发现并同步其工具集: Connect MCP Server, automatically Discover and Sync its Tool Set
浏览器、MCP、查询工具等可复用能力。: Reusable browser, MCP, and query capabilities.
流程能跳过已满足信息，并在关键动作前确认。: The flow skips information already provided and asks for confirmation before critical actions.
留空表示所有技能可调用，多个技能用英文逗号分隔。: Leave blank to allow all skills. Separate multiple skills with commas.
没有读取到可导入的技能文件: No importable skill files were found.
没有可复制的 SOP: No SOPs are available to copy.
没有可复制的工具: No tools are available to copy.
没有可复制的技能: No skills are available to copy.
没有可复制的知识库: No knowledge bases are available to copy.
没有可清空的记忆: There is no memory to clear.
每次新增一个动作；点击已有动作可重新选择。: Add one action at a time. Click an existing action to choose again.
每次执行时交给员工的任务: Task assigned to the employee for each run
每个员工独立维护岗位描述、服务范围、资源绑定和运营记录，适合把客服、导购、运营、: Each employee maintains its own role description, service scope, resource bindings, and operations history, separating support, commerce, operations, and knowledge roles.
描述员工每次执行时需要做什么，可以包含拆解要求、输出格式和注意事项。: Describe what the employee should do each run, including breakdown requirements, output format, and notes.
模型、员工、知识库、技能、SOP、工具、定时任务共同定义员工能力。: Models, employees, knowledge bases, skills, SOPs, tools, and scheduled tasks define employee capabilities together.
模型：默认模型唯一，测试连接成功，密钥脱敏展示。: Model: one default model, successful connection test, and masked credentials.
模型测试失败怎么办？: Model Test Failed What should I do?
模型从本次上传的知识中发现了技能或工具草案，确认后才会写入系统。: The model found skill or tool drafts in the uploaded knowledge. They are written only after confirmation.
模型理解：没有额外限制，流程可以从这里继续。: Model interpretation: there are no additional restrictions, so the flow can continue from here.
默认使用 forbid 并发策略：上一轮未结束时跳过本次唤醒，避免同一员工重复处: The default forbid concurrency policy skips a wake-up while the previous run is active, preventing duplicate work by the same employee.
目录索引，用于按资料、章节、主题逐级展开: A table of contents that expands knowledge by document, section, and topic.
你正在编辑现有技能。导入会进入新建状态，不会覆盖当前技能。: You are editing an existing skill. Importing starts a new item and does not overwrite the current skill.
配置 MCP Server 连接后，可发现其提供的工具并同步为工具集。: Configure an MCP Server connection to discover its tools and sync them as a tool set.
配置单个 HTTP 接口作为工具: Configure an HTTP Endpoint as a Tool
其下 {1} 个已导入工具将一并删除，操作不可撤销。: Its {1} imported tools will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
企业数字员工运行时，从配置到持续运营: Enterprise Digital Employee Runtime, from Configuration to Continuous Operations
启动本地进程并通过标准输入输出通信: Start a local process and communicate through standard input and output.
前端已从事件日志持续同步，但服务端没有写入完成事件。: The frontend kept syncing the event log, but the server did not write a completion event.
前往工具页按现有流程配置和测试工具。: Go to the Tools page to configure and test tools with the current workflow.
清空只会进入一个新的 SOP 草稿工作台，不会删除或替换当前正在编辑的 SOP。: Clearing only opens a new SOP draft workspace. It does not delete or replace the SOP being edited.
请根据当前会话补充人工回复。: Add a human reply based on the current conversation.
请输入开源平台地址、GitHub 仓库或 SKILL.md 链接: Enter an Open-Source Platform URL, GitHub Repository, or SKILL.md Link
请输入密码（首次使用请输入admin）: Masukkan kata sandi (untuk penggunaan pertama masukkan admin)
请输入要调试的知识问题: Enter a knowledge question to debug
请输入账号（首次使用请输入admin）: Masukkan akun (untuk penggunaan pertama masukkan admin)
请先保存 MCP 服务器，才能导入并同步工具。: Save the MCP Server before importing and syncing tools.
请先保存 MCP 服务器，再同步工具: Save the MCP Server Before Syncing Tools
请先测试接口成功后再新增工具: Test the endpoint successfully before adding a tool.
请先创建或选择一个数字员工，再复制工具: Create or Select a Digital Employee Before Copying a Tool
请先选择一个数字员工，再从广场复制 SOP: Select a Digital Employee, Then Copy an SOP from the Marketplace
请先选择一个数字员工，再从广场复制技能: Select a Digital Employee, Then Copy a Skill from the Marketplace
请先选择一个数字员工，再从广场复制知识库: Select a Digital Employee, Then Copy a Knowledge Base from the Marketplace
请先选择一个数字员工再配置定时任务。: Select a Digital Employee Before Configuring Scheduled Tasks.
请先选择一个员工，再从广场复制资源。: Select an Employee, Then Copy Resources from the Marketplace.
请选择复制来源员工: Select the Source Employee to Copy
请选择要复制的知识库: Select a knowledge base to copy
请粘贴原始技能说明，或点击右侧某一块后告诉我需要怎样改写。: Paste the original skill description, or select a section on the right and describe how it should be rewritten.
请至少选择一个要导入的工具: Select at least one tool to import
缺少某个指定字段时进入: Enter when a specified field is missing
缺少样例参数，无法测试接口: Example parameters are required to test the endpoint.
确认端口、健康检查和日志位置。: Confirm the port, health check, and log location.
让 AI 员工可运营、可治理: Make AI Employees Operable and Governable
让员工按一次性、每日、每周或每月计划执行提示词，适合巡检、周报、提醒、异常跟进和: Run employee prompts once, daily, weekly, or monthly for inspections, reports, reminders, exception follow-up, and recurring analysis.
任务信息还在加载，请稍后再发送: Task details are still loading; try sending again shortly
删除后，引用该工具的技能将无法继续调用它，操作不可撤销。: After deletion, skills that reference this tool can no longer call it. This action cannot be undone.
删除后不会移除历史对话记录，但组织 SOP 列表中将不再显示该流程。: Deletion keeps conversation history, but removes this flow from the organization SOP list.
删除后不再唤醒该员工，历史执行记录会继续保留。: Deletion stops waking this employee while preserving historical execution records.
删除后该广场内容会从开放平台移除，已复制到员工侧的引用可能不再可同步。: This removes the Marketplace item from the open platform. Copies on employees may no longer synchronize.
删除后该技能不会再出现在技能广场中，此操作不可撤销。: This skill will no longer appear in the Skill Marketplace. This action cannot be undone.
删除后该技能不会再出现在组织技能库中，此操作不可撤销。: This skill will no longer appear in the organization skill library. This action cannot be undone.
删除后该数字员工会从广场和员工列表移除，相关资源绑定也会一并清理。: This removes the digital employee from the Marketplace and employee list and clears related resource bindings.
删除后该员工的所有配置将一并移除，操作不可撤销。: Deleting this employee also removes all of its configuration. This action cannot be undone.
删除后该账号无法登录，但其创建的数字员工仍然保留。: This account can no longer log in, but digital employees it created are retained.
删除后会同时移除所有连接到这个节点、或从这个节点发出的流转规则。: Deleting this node also removes all incoming and outgoing transition rules.
删除后无法恢复该会话及其消息记录，确定继续吗？: This conversation and its messages cannot be recovered after deletion. Continue?
删除后需要重新导入或手动新建该文件。: After deletion, re-import or manually recreate this file.
商品知识库 -> 比价技能 -> 购买 SOP -> 工具结果反馈: Product Knowledge Base -> Price Comparison Skill -> Purchase SOP -> Tool Result Feedback
上传后这里会显示原始资料、知识图谱和引用来源入库进度: After upload, this area shows ingestion progress for source material, the knowledge graph, and citations.
上传文档即创建知识库: Unggah Dokumen untuk Membuat Basis Pengetahuan
上传业务文档后，系统会先生成知识图谱，再刷新目录索引、引用来源与自发现建议。: After a business document is uploaded, the system builds the knowledge graph, then refreshes the table of contents, citations, and discovery suggestions.
上一步工具调用成功后进入: Enter after the previous tool call succeeds
上一步工具调用失败后进入: Enter after the previous tool call fails
设为 0 时关闭反思；每轮允许模型检查当前技能和工具结果，并决定是否重试其他技能: Set to 0 to disable reflection. Each round lets the model review the current skill and tool results and decide whether to retry another skill or tool.
生成连接已断开，后端任务仍可继续。: Koneksi pembuatan terputus, tugas backend masih dapat dilanjutkan.
生成失败，当前草稿未变更。: Generation failed. The current draft is unchanged.
生成失败，已保留当前草稿: Generation failed. The current draft was retained.
使用内置的 builtin.demo MCP，仅用于演示: Use the built-in builtin. demo MCP for demonstration only
适合浏览器验证和长时间演示。: Suitable for browser validation and long-running demos.
释放以导入 SKILL.md、zip 技能包或完整技能文件夹: Drop to Import SKILL.md, a ZIP Skill Package, or a Complete Skill Folder
售后 SOP -> 订单查询工具 -> 风险回复规则 -> Trace 复盘: After-sales SOP -> Order Lookup Tool -> risk response rules -> Trace Review
输入或粘贴需要整理的 SOP 流程说明: Enter or paste the SOP workflow description to organize.
输入仅当前员工可见的岗位人设: Enter a role persona visible only to the current employee
Ketik pesan, tekan Enter untuk mengirim...
说明你要如何改写右侧选中的部分: Describe how to rewrite the selected section on the right
说明这个节点要完成的目标。: Describe the goal this node must complete.
说明这个知识图谱沉淀了什么知识: Describe the knowledge captured by this graph
搜索 SOP 名称、ID、业务域: Cari Nama SOP, ID, Domain Bisnis
搜索工具名称、描述、URL 或分桶: Cari Nama Alat, Deskripsi, URL atau Bucket
搜索技能名称、Slug、描述或主页: Cari Nama Keterampilan, Slug, Deskripsi atau Beranda
搜索名称、模型、Provider 或 Base URL: Cari Nama, Model, Provider atau Base URL
搜索用户名或显示名: Cari Nama Pengguna atau Nama Tampilan
搜索知识库名称、描述、状态或版本: Cari Nama Basis Pengetahuan, Deskripsi, Status atau Versi
所有必填信息都收集完成后进入: Enter after all required information is collected
所有工具建议已拒绝，SOP 草稿未变更: All tool suggestions were rejected. The SOP draft is unchanged.
填写技能定义并编辑 SKILL.md，保存后可在右侧运行测试。: Complete the Skill Definition and Edit SKILL.md. After Saving, Run a Test on the Right.
停用后其下工具将无法被员工调用。: When disabled, its tools cannot be called by employees.
停用后员工将无法调用该工具。: When disabled, employees cannot call this tool.
停止脚本托管的本地进程。: Stop the local process managed by the script.
通过 HTTP 工具和内置工具连接订单、商品、知识检索或内部服务，让员工可以查询: Use HTTP and built-in tools to connect orders, products, knowledge retrieval, or internal services so employees can query, validate, create, and trigger actions.
通过 HTTP(S) 连接远程 MCP Server: Connect to a remote MCP Server over HTTP(S)
通过 Server-Sent Events 连接远程 MCP Server: Connect to a remote MCP Server through Server-Sent Events
通过 Trace、反馈、记忆和定时任务沉淀失败原因、稳定口径和长期任务。: Gunakan Trace, umpan balik, memori, dan tugas terjadwal untuk menyimpan alasan kegagalan, standar yang stabil, dan tugas jangka panjang.
通过商品知识库、比价技能和购买工具，完成推荐、价格解释、下单确认和结果反馈。: Combine product knowledge, price-comparison skills, and purchase tools for recommendations, price explanations, order confirmation, and result feedback.
头像会显示在我的数字员工、数字员工档案页和对话端的员工选择中。: The avatar appears in My Digital Employees, Employee Profile, and the employee picker in Chat.
推荐单端口启动：企业端、对话端和 API 文档都由同一个 FastAPI 进程挂: Recommended single-port startup: the console, chat, and API docs are mounted by one FastAPI process for local demos and external tunnel testing.
退款、退货、换货流程需要确认订单、查询资格、收集原因并控制承诺边界，是最适合验证: Refund, return, and exchange flows require order confirmation, eligibility checks, reason collection, and controlled commitments, making them ideal for validating SOPs and tool calls.
拖拽文档到这里，或点击上传: Drag a document here or click to upload
完整排行：当前版本差评率: Full Ranking: Current Version Negative Rate
完整排行：当前版本好评率: Full Ranking: Current Version Positive Rate
维护当前数字员工的知识库、知识图谱与检索调试。: Manage the current employee's knowledge bases, knowledge graph, and retrieval debugging.
维护当前数字员工技能的定义、文件包和运行测试。: Maintain the current employee’s skill definition, file package, and runtime tests.
维护技能广场中的技能定义、文件包和运行测试。: Maintain skill definitions, file packages, and runtime tests in the Skill Marketplace.
维护知识库广场中的知识库、知识图谱与检索调试。: Manage marketplace knowledge bases, knowledge graphs, and retrieval debugging.
为当前数字员工创建技能，填写基本信息并编辑技能文件。: Create a skill for the current employee, complete its basic information, and edit its files.
未找到要编辑的技能: The skill to edit was not found.
文件还在解析中，请稍后发送: The file is still being parsed. Send again later.
文件夹中没有找到 SKILL.md: SKILL.md was not found in the folder.
我们来做什么？: Hari ini kita akan membuat apa?
无需保存，直接用当前配置测试连接。: No need to save. Test the connection with the current configuration.
系统可启动、页面可访问、模型可用于生成。: The system starts, pages are accessible, and the model can generate output.
先从低风险、高流程密度、可复盘的任务开始，再逐步接入更强工具和更高风险动作。: Start with low-risk, process-heavy, reviewable tasks, then gradually connect stronger tools and higher-risk actions.
先选一个低风险但流程密集的岗位，例如售后服务、导购、运营巡检或内部知识助手。: Choose a low-risk, process-heavy role first, such as after-sales support, commerce assistant, operations inspection, or internal knowledge assistant.
新增工具或更新 SOP 失败: Failed to Add Tool or Update SOP
修改工具定义，并在右侧验证当前配置或已保存版本。: Edit the tool definition and validate the current configuration or saved version on the right.
选择工具类型并填写定义，可先用右侧探测区测试请求与返回结构。: Select a tool type and complete its definition. Use the probe panel on the right to test request and response structures first.
选择或拖入知识库备份包（.zip）: Select or drop a knowledge base backup package (.zip).
选择一个适合岗位的默认头像。: Select a default avatar suitable for the role.
选择一个数字员工查看能力、岗位和服务范围。: Select a digital employee to view capabilities, role, and service scope.
选择知识库后查看文档卡片、知识索引和知识图谱: Select a knowledge base to view document cards, indexes, and the knowledge graph.
一次测试能变成下一轮配置改进。: Each test can improve the next configuration.
一个文件对应一份独立知识库；回到知识库后可查看文档卡片、知识索引和知识图谱。: Each file creates an independent knowledge base. Return to the knowledge base to view document cards, indexes, and the knowledge graph.
一条业务请求如何被推进: How a business request moves forward
已创建独立任务会话，后台开始执行: Sesi tugas independen dibuat; eksekusi background dimulai
已创建知识库和入库任务: Created Knowledge Base and Ingestion Task
已存在同名文件: A file with the same name already exists
已发布到广场，可在对话端直接使用。: Published to the Marketplace and available directly in Chat.
已回复，原会话会继续执行: Response, original conversation will Continue Execute
排队内容过大，刷新页面后可能无法恢复: Konten antrian terlalu besar untuk dipulihkan setelah menyegarkan halaman
已加载「{1}」。你可以在右侧选择一个或多个区域，然后在这里描述需要怎样改写。: Loaded “{1}”. Select one or more sections on the right, then describe how they should be rewritten.
已确认 {1} 个工具，当前草稿已局部更新: Confirmed {1} tools. The current draft was partially updated.
已确认，等待其他工具建议处理完成后统一更新 SOP: Confirmed. The SOP will update after all other tool suggestions are resolved.
已删除的定时任务不能重新启用: Deleted scheduled tasks cannot be re-enabled
已生成「{1}」草稿。你可以在右侧选择一个或多个区域继续改写。: Generated the “{1}” draft. Select one or more sections on the right to continue rewriting.
已完成的定时任务可编辑后重新启用: Completed scheduled tasks can be edited and re-enabled.
以当前数字员工的口吻回复。提交后，原会话会继续推进 SOP 流程。: Reply in the current digital employee’s voice. After submission, the original conversation resumes its SOP flow.
用测试参数直接调用已保存工具，检查员工后续调用时的实际返回。: Call the saved tool with test parameters to verify what the employee will receive during later calls.
用对话日志、Trace、反馈分析和事件记录串起路由、工具调用、回复与改进线索，失: Connect routing, tool calls, replies, and improvement evidence with conversation logs, Trace, feedback analysis, and events so failures can be located precisely.
用户明确拒绝后进入: Enter after the user explicitly declines
用户明确确认后进入: Enter after the user explicitly confirms
用户选择了创建定时任务模式: User Select Create Scheduled Task Mode
用节点、必填信息、允许动作、中断策略和回复规则描述流程；已满足的信息不重复追问，: Describe flows with nodes, required information, allowed actions, interruption policy, and response rules. Do not ask again for information already provided.
用一句话描述，例如：报文已获取后进入: Describe it in one sentence, for example: enter after the payload is received.
用一句话描述什么时候进入，例如：用户已经提供商品名称后进入: Describe when to enter in one sentence, for example: enter after the user provides a product name.
用于检查当前知识库的知识图谱结构，发现断链、孤立页、重复主题等问题。检查结果仅作: Inspect the current knowledge graph for broken links, isolated pages, and duplicate topics. Results are advisory and do not modify data.
用于路由和接口路径，例如 weather-zh: Used for routing and endpoint paths, for example: weather-zh.
用于数字员工档案页顶部展示的 system prompt 摘要: System prompt summary shown at the top of the digital employee profile
用于员工选择技能时的说明: Description Shown When Employees Select This Skill
右侧已更新预览，等待确认或拒绝: Preview updated on the right; awaiting confirmation or rejection
员工：岗位边界明确，资源绑定清楚，状态可管理。: Employee: clear role boundaries, explicit resource bindings, and manageable status.
员工能按业务规则推进，而不是自由发挥。: Employees follow business rules instead of improvising.
员工在对话中的角色、人设、回复风格和执行边界: The employee’s role, persona, response style, and execution boundaries in conversations.
运行后将在这里显示回复、执行流程、代码和输出: After running, replies, execution steps, code, and output appear here.
运行流已结束，但未收到最终结果: The run stream ended without a final result.
运营：日志、Trace、反馈、记忆能形成闭环。: Operations: logs, Trace, feedback, and memory form a closed loop.
在左侧输入说明或上传文档后开始生成: Enter instructions or upload a document on the left to start generation.
暂无 SOP，点击「新增」创建一个吧: Belum Ada SOP. Klik "Tambah" untuk Membuat.
暂无工具，点击「新增」创建一个吧: Belum Ada Alat. Klik "Tambah" untuk Membuat.
暂无技能，点击「新增」创建一个吧: Belum Ada Keterampilan. Klik "Tambah" untuk Membuat.
暂无可读代表来源: No readable representative source is available.
暂无可展示的切片正文，可点击编辑加载完整引用来源。: No chunk text is available to display. Click Edit to load the full citation source.
暂无模型，点击「新建模型」添加一个吧: Belum Ada Model. Klik "Model Baru" untuk Menambahkan.
暂无知识库，点击「新增」创建一个吧: Belum Ada Basis Pengetahuan. Klik "Tambah" untuk Membuat.
这不是单次 demo，而是一条最短运营闭环：配置、验证、复盘、沉淀。: This is not a one-off demo. It is the shortest operating loop: configure, validate, review, and retain.
这个动作已经添加过了: This action has already been added
这会把当前数字员工的本地版本发布为广场可复用的 SOP 新版本。: This publishes the current employee’s local version as a reusable new SOP version in the Marketplace.
这些不是跳转入口，而是配置时应当检查的对象和验收标准。: These are configuration checks and acceptance criteria, not navigation shortcuts.
这只会在当前数字员工中隐藏该 SOP；开放广场和其他数字员工仍然保留。: This only hides the SOP for the current employee. The Marketplace and other employees keep it.
这只会在当前数字员工中隐藏该技能；开放广场和其他数字员工仍然保留。: This only hides the skill for the current employee. The Marketplace and other employees keep it.
这只会在当前数字员工中隐藏该知识库；开放广场和其他数字员工仍然保留。: This only hides the knowledge base for the current employee. The Marketplace and other employees keep it.
真正能落地的企业 AI，需要知道它做了什么、为什么这么做、哪里失败、下一次如何改: Production enterprise AI must show what it did, why it did it, where it failed, and how to improve next time.
Retrieving through the table of contents and knowledge graph, then organizing citation sources...
正在理解技能目标与输入信息: Understand Skill Target and Input Information
支持 doc/docx/txt/md/html/pdf；旧版 doc 会提示转换: Supports doc, docx, txt, md, html, and pdf. Legacy doc files must be converted to docx.
支持常见图片格式，会自动裁剪为方形头像。: Common image formats are supported and automatically cropped to a square avatar.
支持开源平台地址、GitHub repo/tree/raw SKILL.md 或: Supports open-source platform URLs, GitHub repo/tree/raw SKILL.md URLs, and owner/repo format. Import local zip or Markdown files from “Import > Select File” on the edit page.
知识：文档解析完成，能命中引用，口径可复查。: Knowledge: documents are parsed, citations can be retrieved, and standards can be reviewed.
知识库 -> 引用回复 -> 反馈分析 -> 知识更新: Knowledge Base -> Citation Response -> Feedback Analysis -> Knowledge Update
知识库没有引用怎么办？: Knowledge Baseno Citation What should I do?
知识图谱以结构化文本保存，标题和摘要会同步写入内容。: Knowledge graphs are stored as structured text, with title and summary synchronized into the content.
知识引用、长期记忆、会话状态和反馈结果进入下一次决策。: Knowledge citations, long-term memory, conversation state, and feedback feed the next decision.
只给员工接入它真正需要的工具，例如订单查询、商品购买、内部查询或知识检索。: Connect only the tools an employee truly needs, such as order lookup, product purchase, internal queries, or knowledge retrieval.
只有管理员可以编辑技能广场内容: Only administrators can edit Skill Marketplace content.
至少需要保留一个节点: At least one node is required.
重新编辑会回到这条消息发送前的 SOP 草稿，并截断之后的推理记录。: Editing again restores the SOP draft from before this message and removes subsequent reasoning records.
周期巡检、周报、异常提醒和待办跟进可以配置为定时任务，让员工在后台持续推进。: Configure inspections, weekly reports, exception reminders, and follow-ups as scheduled tasks so employees can keep working in the background.
准备 OpenAI 兼容模型、单端口服务和 demo 租户数据，让企业端、对话端: Prepare an OpenAI-compatible model, single-port service, and demo tenant data so the console, chat, and API docs run from one local entry point.
最底层可读知识页，回答时基于页面内容并追溯引用来源: The lowest-level readable knowledge page, used to answer from page content with traceable citations.
作为唯一标识，仅支持字母/数字/下划线；中文将自动转拼音，最长 15 字符。: Unique identifier. Supports letters, numbers, and underscores. Chinese is converted to pinyin, up to 15 characters.
Enter 发送 / Shift+Enter 换行: Enter untuk kirim / Shift+Enter untuk baris baru
GET 会把这里的字段作为查询参数追加到 URL；参数值填写未编码原文，例如 t: GET appends these fields to the URL as query parameters. Enter unencoded values, for example Asia/Shanghai for timezone.
Headers 或 Env 不是合法 JSON: Headers or Env is not valid JSON.
JSON 配置格式不正确，请检查 Headers、Auth、Schema 或 M: The JSON configuration is invalid. Check Headers, Auth, Schema, or MCP Config.
PilotDeck 把能力分成 WorkSpace、Router、Memory、: PilotDeck groups capabilities into WorkSpace, Router, Memory, Always On, and Gateway. StaffDeck applies them to enterprise digital employees with role boundaries, knowledge governance, workflow execution, tool calls, and operational review.
Router、Agent Loop、Skill Runtime 和 Respon: Router, Agent Loop, Skill Runtime and Response Generator Advance Task.
SKILL.md 是技能入口，不能删除: SKILL.md is the skill entry point and cannot be deleted.
SOP 为什么重复追问？: Why does the SOP repeat follow-up questions?
SOP 已保存，当前改写已清空: SOP Saved and the Current Rewrite Was Cleared
SOP ID 已存在，已另存为 {1}: The SOP ID already exists and was saved as {1}
SOP：节点、槽位、允许动作和回复规则明确。: SOP: Nodes, Slots, Allowed Actions, and Response Rules Are Clearly Defined.
Temperature 与 Max Tokens 必须是数字: Temperature and Max Tokens must be numeric
Trace 展示路由、槽位和工具调用: Trace Shows Routing, Slots, and Tool Calls
Trace、事件日志和反馈分析让每次执行都能被追踪和改进。: Trace, event logs, and feedback analysis make every execution traceable and improvable.
StaffDeck 把模型、数字员工、知识库、技能、SOP、工具、记忆、定时任务: StaffDeck connects models, digital employees, knowledge bases, skills, SOPs, tools, memory, scheduled tasks, and Trace into a configurable, verifiable, and reviewable business conversation system.
StaffDeck 的对话不是单轮问答。它会在路由、知识、技能、SOP、工具和回: StaffDeck conversations are not single-turn Q&A. They form a traceable execution chain across routing, knowledge, skills, SOPs, tools, and response generation.
StaffDeck 的核心不是“能聊天”，而是让一个真实岗位拥有自己的配置、资源: StaffDeck is not just chat. It gives a real role its own configuration, resources, execution rules, and operations history. Each employee has independent knowledge, SOPs, tools, and memory, and every conversation can be reviewed end to end.
URL 已包含查询参数时请把 HTTP Method 切换为 GET；POST: If the URL already contains query parameters, switch HTTP Method to GET. POST sends test parameters as a JSON body.
待回答会话仅支持发送人工回复: Awaiting-reply conversations only accept human replies
待回答暂不支持附件，请发送文字回复: Attachments are not supported for awaiting replies; send a text reply instead
当前账号不能直接向该会话发送消息，请从待回答列表回复: This account cannot message the conversation directly; reply from the Awaiting Reply list
还没有可用模型配置，数字员工暂不能调用模型。请先完成模型配置。: Belum ada konfigurasi model yang tersedia, karyawan digital belum dapat memanggil model. Harap selesaikan konfigurasi model terlebih dahulu.
系统管理员尚未配置可用模型，数字员工暂不能调用模型。请联系管理员完成模型配置。: Administrator sistem belum mengkonfigurasi model yang tersedia, karyawan digital belum dapat memanggil model. Silakan hubungi administrator untuk menyelesaikan konfigurasi model.
还没有可用模型配置，发送消息前请先完成模型配置。: No usable model configuration is available. Please configure a model before sending messages.
系统管理员尚未配置可用模型，暂时无法发送消息。请联系管理员完成模型配置。: The system administrator has not configured an available model, so messages cannot be sent yet. Please contact an administrator to complete model configuration.
模型配置正在加载，请稍后再发送: Model configuration is still loading. Please try sending again shortly.
无法读取模型配置，请刷新页面后重试: Unable to load model configuration. Please refresh the page and try again.
系统管理员尚未配置可用模型，请联系管理员完成模型配置: The system administrator has not configured an available model. Please contact an administrator to complete model configuration.
请填写配置名称、Provider 和 Model: Enter a configuration name, Provider, and Model
模型连接失败，请检查配置后重试。: Model connection failed. Check the configuration and try again.
模型保存或连接测试失败，请检查配置后重试。: Model saving or connection test failed. Check the configuration and try again.
当前没有可用模型。完成配置并通过连通性测试后，才能发送对话和执行任务。: Belum ada model yang tersedia. Setelah konfigurasi lulus uji koneksi, Anda dapat mengirim percakapan dan menjalankan tugas.
当前账号没有模型管理权限，请联系管理员完成模型配置和连通性测试。: This account does not have model management permission. Contact an administrator to configure and test the model.
